summary: Tailwind v3 reads design tokens from `tailwind.config.{js,ts}`. The `content` array declares files scanned for class strings; JIT mode is the default since 3.0.
bestPractices: Declare every source path in `content` — globs that miss files cause silent omission of utility classes.
Use the `theme.extend` block to add tokens without overriding the default palette/spacing scales.
Co-locate plugin enablement (`@tailwindcss/forms`, etc.) in the config file, not via imports in CSS.
antiPatterns: Mutating `tailwind.config.js` exports at runtime — the config is read at build time only.
Mixing `tailwind.config.js` with v4-style `@theme` CSS tokens — they belong to different major versions.
Listing `node_modules` paths in `content` without a tight glob — explodes scan time.
